ADAPTATION.description: Whenever you enter Wrath, draw 2 cards.
ADAPTATION.name: Rushdown

AFTER_IMAGE.description: Whenever you play a card, gain Block.
AFTER_IMAGE.name: After Image

AMPLIFY.description: Your next Power card is played twice.
AMPLIFY.name: Amplify

A_THOUSAND_CUTS.description: Whenever you play a card, deal damage to ALL enemies.
A_THOUSAND_CUTS.name: Thousand Cuts

BARRICADE.description: Block is not removed at the start of your turn.
BARRICADE.name: Barricade

BATTLEHYMN.description: At the start of each turn, add a Smite into your hand.
BATTLEHYMN.name: Battle Hymn

BERSERK.description: At the start of your turn, gain Energy.
BERSERK.name: Berserk

BIASED_COGNITION.description: At the start of your turn, lose Focus.
BIASED_COGNITION.name: Bias

BLASPHEMY.description: At the start of your next turn, you die.
BLASPHEMY.name: Blasphemer

BLUR.description: Block is not removed at the start of your next turn.
BLUR.name: Blur

BRUTALITY.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and draw a card.
BRUTALITY.name: Brutality

BUFFER.description: Prevent the next time you would lose HP.
BUFFER.name: Buffer

BURST.description: Your next Skill is played twice.
BURST.name: Burst

CHOKE.description: Whenever you play a card this turn, deal damage.
CHOKE.name: Choked

COMBUST.description: At the end of your turn, lose HP and deal damage to ALL enemies.
COMBUST.name: Combust

CORPSE_EXPLOSION.description: On death, deal damage equal to max HP to ALL enemies.
CORPSE_EXPLOSION.name: Corpse Explosion

CORRUPTION.description: Skills cost 0. Whenever you play a Skill, Exhaust it.
CORRUPTION.name: Corruption

CREATIVE_AI.description: At the start of your turn, add a random Power card into your hand.
CREATIVE_AI.name: Creative AI

DARK_EMBRACE.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, draw 1 card.
DARK_EMBRACE.name: Dark Embrace

DEMON_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain Strength.
DEMON_FORM.name: Demon Form

DEVAFORM.description: At the start of your turn, gain increasing Energy.
DEVAFORM.name: Deva

DEVOTION.description: At the start of your turn, gain Mantra.
DEVOTION.name: Devotion

DOUBLE_TAP.description: Your next Attack is played twice.
DOUBLE_TAP.name: Double Tap

ECHO_FORM.description: The first card you play each turn is played twice.
ECHO_FORM.name: Echo Form

ENVENOM.description: Whenever you deal unblocked attack damage, apply Poison.
ENVENOM.name: Envenom

ESTABLISHMENT.description: Whenever a card is Retained, reduce its cost by 1.
ESTABLISHMENT.name: Establishment

EVOLVE.description: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw a card.
EVOLVE.name: Evolve

FEEL_NO_PAIN.description: Whenever a card is Exhausted, gain Block.
FEEL_NO_PAIN.name: Feel No Pain

FIRE_BREATHING.description: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal damage to ALL enemies.
FIRE_BREATHING.name: Fire Breathing

HEATSINKS.description: Whenever you play a Power card, draw a card.
HEATSINKS.name: Heatsink

HELLO_WORLD.description: At the start of your turn, add a random Common card into your hand.
HELLO_WORLD.name: Hello World

INFINITE_BLADES.description: At the start of your turn, add a Shiv into your hand.
INFINITE_BLADES.name: Infinite Blades

JUGGERNAUT.description: Whenever you gain Block, deal damage to a random enemy.
JUGGERNAUT.name: Juggernaut

LIKEWATER.description: At the end of your turn, if you are in Calm, gain Block.
LIKEWATER.name: Like Water

LOCKON.description: Orbs deal 50% more damage to this enemy.
LOCKON.name: Lock-On

LOOP.description: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next Orb.
LOOP.name: Loop

MAGNETISM.description: At the start of your turn, add a random Colorless card into your hand.
MAGNETISM.name: Magnetism

MASTERREALITY.description: Whenever a card is created, Upgrade it.
MASTERREALITY.name: Master Reality

MAYHEM.description: At the start of your turn, play the top card of your draw pile.
MAYHEM.name: Mayhem

MENTALFORTRESS.description: Whenever you change Stance, gain Block.
MENTALFORTRESS.name: Mental Fortress

METALLICIZE.description: At the end of your turn, gain Block.
METALLICIZE.name: Metallicize

NOXIOUS_FUMES.description: At the start of your turn, apply Poison to ALL enemies.
NOXIOUS_FUMES.name: Noxious Fumes

PANACHE.description: Every 5 cards played, deal damage to ALL enemies.
PANACHE.name: Panache

PANICBUTTON.description: You cannot gain Block from cards.
PANICBUTTON.name: No Block

RAGE.description: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain Block.
RAGE.name: Rage

REBOUND.description: The next card you play is placed on top of your draw pile.
REBOUND.name: Rebound

RUPTURE.description: Whenever you lose HP from a card, gain Strength.
RUPTURE.name: Rupture

SADISTIC_NATURE.description: Whenever you apply a debuff, deal damage.
SADISTIC_NATURE.name: Sadistic Nature

SELF_REPAIR.description: At the end of combat, heal HP.
SELF_REPAIR.name: Self Repair

STATIC_DISCHARGE.description: Whenever you receive attack damage, Channel Lightning.
STATIC_DISCHARGE.name: Static Discharge

STORM.description: Whenever you play a Power card, Channel Lightning.
STORM.name: Storm

STUDY.description: At the end of your turn, shuffle an Insight into your draw pile.
STUDY.name: Study

TALKTOTHEHAND.description: Whenever you attack this enemy, gain Block.
TALKTOTHEHAND.name: Block Return

THE_BOMB.description: At the end of 3 turns, deal massive damage to ALL enemies.
THE_BOMB.name: The Bomb

TOOLS_OF_THE_TRADE.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.
TOOLS_OF_THE_TRADE.name: Tools of the Trade

VENGEANCE.description: At the start of your next turn, enter Wrath.
VENGEANCE.name: Wrath Next Turn

WAVEOFTHEHAND.description: Whenever you gain Block this turn, apply Weak to ALL enemies.
WAVEOFTHEHAND.name: Wave of the Hand

WIREHEADING.description: At the start of your turn, Scry.
WIREHEADING.name: Foresight

WRAITH_FORM_V2.description: At the end of your turn, lose Dexterity.
WRAITH_FORM_V2.name: Wraith Form
